dialogue_text: until all the jurymen are back in their proper places—_all_,
source_excerpt: "The trial cannot proceed," said the King in a very grave voice, "until all the jurymen are back in their proper places—_all_," he repeated with great emphasis, looking hard at Alice as he said so.
